name: Tom Kha Gai
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
3 Stalks of lemon grass, cut into 2-inch pieces and separated
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken, lemon grass, and galangal in a soup pot.
2. Add the water and coconut milk to the pot.
3. Cook over medium heat for about 30 minutes.
4. Add the sugar, salt, and dried crushed red chilis (if using) to the pot.
5. Simmer for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Adjust the seasoning with salt, sugar, or water as needed, depending on the brand of coconut milk used.
7. Serve hot with extra chili slices and white rice.
